---
title: GFM tables
---

A simple table:

| Column A | Column B |
| -------- | -------- |
| One      | Two      |
| Three    | Four     |

A table with alignment:

| Left | Center | Right |
| :--- | :----: | ----: |
| a    |   b    |     c |
| dd   |   ee   |    ff |

A table with inline formatting in cells:

| Term          | Definition                                |
| ------------- | ----------------------------------------- |
| **Bold term** | Definition with `code` and _emphasis_.    |
| Plain         | Definition with [a link](/elsewhere/foo). |

Body after the tables.
